data.content:
1. The reviewed branch implements the knots-core side of the acceptance field, including schema, CLI, event, prompt, sync, rehydration, and tests, and `make sanity` passes in an isolated checkout (703 tests, 95.05% coverage).
2. The parent knot description also requires the foolery knots-backend to replace the addNote shim and read acceptance back in toBeat().
3. This repository/branch contains no foolery backend implementation to review for that requirement, so the parent knot is incomplete against its stated specification and cannot be approved at implementation_review.
